top_signals.title: Switzerland Looks Set to Reject 10-Million Population Cap
top_signals.summary: Switzerland looks set to reject capping its population at 10 million people, a radical proposal that would have marked an escalation in efforts by wealthy nations around the world to put strict curbs on immigration.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.
